description:
Parent epic: V3 E6: Credential brokering

Source task 8/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Document how brokers/proxies/connect layers inject real credentials at
  execution time.

Epic closure criteria:
- credential brokering has either a working minimal implementation or a
  deliberately documented interface contract with follow-up issues
- the security invariant is tested: no raw credential values leak

comments.text: Documented the credential broker execution boundary: Jidoka carries references and blocks raw secrets, while app-owned brokers/proxies/connect layers resolve and inject credentials at tool execution time.
